# PERF-218 positive: single global pool on hot path
lang: go
file: PERF-218-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var bufPool sync.Pool

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	buf := bufPool.Get()
	bufPool.Put(buf)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
